idea: A command‑line Python tool that scans a directory of automation scripts, extracts each script’s docstring and comment‑based usage examples, and auto‑generates a concise README (or markdown table) listing script names, brief descriptions, required inputs, and example commands.

A command‑line Python script that fetches the top 10 trending GitHub repositories for a specified language (using the GitHub Trending API or scraping), then generates a ready‑to‑publish Markdown report containing each repo’s name, description, star count, and link.

A command‑line Python script that aggregates the outputs of the existing Bitcoin‑price, London‑weather, and top‑5‑news tools into a single self‑contained HTML dashboard (with icons, timestamps, and optional email notification), allowing users to view all three data streams at a glance.
